theme: P0 patches from v2.7.0 audit — coherence loop + REFINE category + canonical _field_types doc
summary: Three P0 patches surfaced by the v2.7.0 fresh-instance audit. (1) Close the coherence_check event loop so the sub-skill emits an event the turn-end hook can verify. (2) Add a REFINE category to checkpoint-resolver with franglais matching patterns. (3) Ship a canonical reference for _field_types — the four-value tag (observed | stated | derived | structured) was cited in 8+ skills and CLAUDE.md but had no dedicated doc, leading to drift on edge cases (tone_of_voice as observed vs stated, benefit chains as structured vs observed).

changes.reason: Canonical reference for the four field-type tags. Binary decision test per type, decisive examples, 5 hard rules (no manual derived, tag exactly once, precision > globs, structured requires framework ref, unmapped writes refused).
Cross-ref to field-types.md from the Field Type System section.
Add field-types.md to the Reference (on-demand) block.

operator_impact: None visible. Doc + plumbing only. Agents lose the ambiguity that caused tag drift on edge cases.
tested_on: audit P0 #3 closure verified by re-reading the new doc against the cited skills
caught_by: v2.7.0 fresh-instance audit (3 P0 findings logged at end of S36).
known_gaps: Patch P0 #1 (coherence loop closure) shipped here as a soft prescription — proven half-fix in v2.7.2 stress test, walked back to a mechanical Python primitive.
